diagrams.title: Multiple Stacks in Array (Divide and Conquer)
diagrams.description: Shows how an array is divided into K sections for K stacks with boundaries
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how multiple stacks share array space with defined boundaries

diagrams.title: Circular Queue State Transitions
diagrams.description: Depicts circular queue operations showing how front and rear pointers move
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how circular queue efficiently uses array space through wrap-around

diagrams.title: Multiple Queues in Array
diagrams.description: Shows multiple independent queues stored in a single array
diagrams.purpose: Understanding representation of multiple queues and their independent operations

diagrams.title: Types of Deque
diagrams.description: Illustrates input-restricted and output-restricted deque operations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding restrictions in different types of deques
